title: Generate Illustration Me As You Imagine It
sourceTitle: Generate Illustration Me As You Imagine It

imagePrompts.prompt: Generate an illustration of "me" as you imagine it. Features include a Japanese illustration style, distinct character features, natural emotional expressions, a half-body composition, dynamic poses, exquisite clothing details, a hand-drawn graffiti style, ink splatter strokes, free-flowing lines, a blend of pastels and ink, a comic sketch texture, a minimalist white background, surrounding symbolic elements, a strong atmosphere, high detail, and high quality.
imagePrompts.title: Generate Illustration Me As You Imagine It

prompt: Generate an illustration of "me" as you imagine it. Features include a Japanese illustration style, distinct character features, natural emotional expressions, a half-body composition, dynamic poses, exquisite clothing details, a hand-drawn graffiti style, ink splatter strokes, free-flowing lines, a blend of pastels and ink, a comic sketch texture, a minimalist white background, surrounding symbolic elements, a strong atmosphere, high detail, and high quality.
originalPrompt: Generate an illustration of "me" as you imagine it. Features include a Japanese illustration style, distinct character features, natural emotional expressions, a half-body composition, dynamic poses, exquisite clothing details, a hand-drawn graffiti style, ink splatter strokes, free-flowing lines, a blend of pastels and ink, a comic sketch texture, a minimalist white background, surrounding symbolic elements, a strong atmosphere, high detail, and high quality.

promptTranslations.zh: 生成你想象中的“我”的插图。日式插画风格，人物特征鲜明，情感表达自然，半身构图，动感的姿势，精致的服装细节，手绘涂鸦风格，泼墨笔触，流畅的线条，粉彩与水墨的交融，漫画素描质感，极简的白色背景，周围的象征元素，氛围浓厚，细节高，品质高。
promptTranslations.fr: Générez une illustration de « moi » tel que vous l’imaginez. Les caractéristiques incluent un style d'illustration japonais, des traits de caractère distincts, des expressions émotionnelles naturelles, une composition à moitié corps, des poses dynamiques, des détails vestimentaires exquis, un style de graffiti dessiné à la main, des traits d'éclaboussures d'encre, des lignes fluides, un mélange de pastels et d'encre, une texture de croquis de bande dessinée, un fond blanc minimaliste, des éléments symboliques environnants, une atmosphère forte, des détails élevés et une haute qualité.
promptTranslations.ru: Создайте иллюстрацию «я», как вы ее себе представляете. Особенности включают в себя японский стиль иллюстрации, четкие черты характера, естественные эмоциональные выражения, композицию половины тела, динамичные позы, изысканные детали одежды, рисованный стиль граффити, брызги чернил, свободные линии, смесь пастели и чернил, текстуру комического эскиза, минималистский белый фон, окружающие символические элементы, сильную атмосферу, высокую детализацию и высокое качество.
promptTranslations.pt: Gere uma ilustração de “eu” conforme você a imagina. Os recursos incluem um estilo de ilustração japonês, características distintas de personagens, expressões emocionais naturais, uma composição de meio corpo, poses dinâmicas, detalhes de roupas requintados, um estilo de graffiti desenhado à mão, traços de tinta, linhas de fluxo livre, uma mistura de tons pastéis e tinta, uma textura de esboço cômico, um fundo branco minimalista, elementos simbólicos circundantes, uma atmosfera forte, alto detalhe e alta qualidade.
promptTranslations.ja: あなたの想像通りの「私」のイラストを生成します。特徴としては、日本のイラスト スタイル、独特のキャラクターの特徴、自然な感情表現、半身構成、ダイナミックなポーズ、絶妙な衣服のディテール、手描きの落書きスタイル、インク スプラッタ ストローク、自由に流れる線、パステルとインクのブレンド、コミック スケッチのテクスチャ、ミニマリストの白い背景、周囲の象徴的な要素、強い雰囲気、高いディテール、高品質が含まれます。
promptTranslations.ko: 당신이 상상하는 대로 "나"의 일러스트레이션을 생성하십시오. 일본식 일러스트레이션 스타일, 뚜렷한 캐릭터 특징, 자연스러운 감정 표현, 반신 구도, 역동적인 포즈, 절묘한 의상 디테일, 손으로 그린 ​​그래피티 스타일, 잉크 튀김 스트로크, 자유롭게 흐르는 선, 파스텔과 잉크의 혼합, 코믹한 스케치 질감, 미니멀한 흰색 배경, 주변의 상징적 요소, 강렬한 분위기, 높은 디테일, 고품질 등이 특징입니다.
